description: Source code for the claims management page in a React/Next.js application, providing UI for displaying, filtering, uploading, and creating insurance claims, including support for additional claim fields such as claimant_name, claimant_address, policy_number, and third_parties.

methods.name: loadClaims
methods.description: Asynchronous function to fetch claims data based on current filters and update state.

methods.name: handleCSVUpload
methods.description: Handles the CSV file upload process, submits the file to the server, and updates upload results.

methods.name: handleCreateClaim
methods.description: Handles form submission for creating a new claim, including new fields and updating state.
